title: JobPosting
description: A job posting on Indeed with all associated metadata including title, description, location, salary, benefits, qualifications, and application configuration.

jobPostingId.description: A unique identifier for the job posting within the source system. Used in combination with sourceName for upsert operations.

title.description: The title of the job posting. Maximum length of 75 characters.

description.description: The full description of the job posting including responsibilities, requirements, and other details. Must be between 30 and 20,000 characters.
description.example: We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our growing team...

qualifications.description: Required or preferred qualifications for the position.

remoteWorkPolicy.description: The remote work policy for the position.

employer.description: Reference to the employer posting this job.

id.description: The employer's unique identifier on Indeed.

status.description: The current status of the job posting on Indeed.

applicationUrl.description: The URL where candidates can apply for the position.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the job posting was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the job posting was last updated.

expiresAt.description: The timestamp when the job posting expires.
